main.head: Pro tip of the week:
main.massive: The key to lasting success in trading is making sensible investments. Professional traders live by this principle, that’s why they follow this rule:
main.lines:
An investment should not exceed 5%
of your current balance
main.1-block: If you have a balance of $100, a 5% limit means you can place as many as 30 orders, so even if some are unsuccessful, there’s still a great chance that the others will make up for the lost investments.
main.2-block: Having more trading opportunities promises the freedom to try different assets and technical indicators to better adjust to a particular market setting.
main.3-block: Mind the economic news releases. Don’t let a sudden spike or a dip in price due to a release take you by surprise. Check the economic calendar regularly to get an understanding of what might come up.
main.cta: Keep checking your mailbox for more pro trading tips from IQ Option to get your trading on the next level!
